visual_identity.hair: dark, slightly disheveled from Tokyo work stress, beginning to relax
visual_identity.clothing: rumpled dress shirt with rolled sleeves — Tokyo office wear meeting island casualness
visual_identity.silhouette_note: Front-facing; slightly taller/lankier than NPCs; head proportion sets chibi baseline
visual_identity.color_palette: warm neutral — shirt light blue-grey, pants dark denim

visual_identity.hair: practical, slightly windswept; keeps it tied back for island work
visual_identity.clothing: sakura pink #F0C4C4 accents; island-practical but graceful
visual_identity.signature_prop: worn notebook — always carried, often held left-handed
visual_identity.silhouette_note: Notebook is a strong unique silhouette identifier; always visible at her left

visual_identity.body_type: stocky, weathered, broad-shouldered for his age
visual_identity.clothing: deep sea blue #4A6D9A fisherman's vest; rolled pants; bare feet or deck shoes
visual_identity.age_indicators: strong weathered lines on face; hands show decades of fishing
visual_identity.silhouette_note: Stockiest of all characters; unique by body width and fisherman gear

visual_identity.clothing: bamboo green #7DBE77 pottery apron over light blouse; clay-stained hands
visual_identity.hair: practical updo bun; a few strands loose from work
visual_identity.posture: slight forward lean from decades of pottery work
visual_identity.silhouette_note: Apron shape + bun = unique silhouette; arm position often bent (work)

visual_identity.clothing: deep forest green #3D6645 outdoor vest with many pockets; sturdy pants; hiking boots
visual_identity.posture: attentive slight head tilt; listening stance
visual_identity.silhouette_note: Windswept hair + vest pockets = unique profile; head tilt is characteristic

visual_identity.clothing: deep night blue #2A4060 kimono-style top; dignified; always a warm layer
visual_identity.silhouette_note: Upswept hair + kimono silhouette = dignified, distinct from all other characters

visual_identity.color: warm orange tabby with dark navy #2A3650 collar/marking
visual_identity.silhouette_note: Cat sitting silhouette is entirely distinct; ears + round cat body + tail = unmistakable
